task_completion.description: Verify that the four required audio tracks have been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for track headers in the editor window or channel strips in the mixer window named 'Upright Bass', 'Piano', 'Drums', and 'Saxophone'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the session tempo is set to approximately 140 BPM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the tempo/meter section in the top transport bar of Ardour. The tempo should read 140 (or between 135 and 145).

task_completion.description: Verify that the fader gains for 'Upright Bass' and 'Drums' are adjusted correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the mixer strips for the tracks. The 'Upright Bass' fader should be set around -3 dB (acceptable -5 to -1 dB) and the 'Drums' fader around -6 dB (acceptable -8 to -4 dB). Other tracks should remain at 0 dB.

task_completion.description: Verify that at least three location markers are placed on the timeline.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Location Markers ruler at the top of the timeline. There should be at least three markers visible, named 'Set Start', 'Intermission', and 'Set End'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Saxophone' track is muted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'M' (Mute) button on the 'Saxophone' track header or mixer strip. It should be highlighted/active.

task_completion.description: Verify that a session snapshot named 'Pre_Show_Template' was saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Save Snapshot' dialog box with the name 'Pre_Show_Template' entered, or check if the main window title bar reflects the new snapshot name.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the Ardour GUI to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show interaction with the Ardour application windows, menus, and dialogs, rather than a terminal window executing commands to modify the session file.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not cheat by manually editing the Ardour XML session file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no text editors (like nano, vim, or gedit) open showing the raw .ardour XML code.

integrity.description: Verify that no audio files were imported into the session.
integrity.visual_evidence: The timeline for all tracks should be completely empty, with no audio regions or waveforms visible.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Required tracks: 'Upright Bass', 'Piano', 'Drums', 'Saxophone'. Target tempo: 140 BPM (acceptable tolerance is 135-145 BPM). Upright Bass gain acceptable range: -5.0 to -1.0 dB. Drums gain acceptable range: -8.0 to -4.0 dB. Minimum 3 markers required ('Set Start', 'Intermission', 'Set End'). The Saxophone track must be muted. The snapshot must be named 'Pre_Show_Template' (saved as Pre_Show_Template.ardour).
